description: Delivery Framework represents a management unit of work defined by the organization or entity doing the work. In IATI, the Delivery Framework is an “Activity.”
An Indicator describes what will be measured to track evidence of a Result. Indicators can be qualitative or quantitative and may or may not be aggregable.
Library used to store Goals, Objectives, Targets, Outcomes, Indicators, and other items for measurement.
Records the details regarding the relationships between measurement items.
Used to track where measurement items have been used.
A Result is a container that represents the changes in the context in which an organization operates..
